markdown:
#  Link your DocuSignยฎ account to a Procore project 
##  Background 
After the DocuSignยฎ integration is enabled on a project, you can then link your DocuSignยฎ account to that project. This gives you the ability to initiate the DocuSignยฎ signature from supported Project Tools.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * Your Procore user account must be granted the required user permissions on the Procore project tool that you want to request signatures with. See [Which Procore tools support the DocuSignยฎ integration?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-project-tools-support-the-docusign-integration)
  * **Additional Information:**
    * To request signatures using the Procore + DocuSignยฎ integration, you must have an active DocuSignยฎ account. For details, see:* [Do I need a DocuSignยฉ account?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-do-i-need-a-docusign-account)* [How do I get a DocuSignยฎ account?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-do-i-get-a-docusign-account)
    * You must be in a project to view the option to link your DocuSignยฎ Account from Procore.


##  Prerequisites 
  * Enable the Procore + DocuSignยฎ Integration. See [Enable the Docusignยฎ Integration](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-company/tutorials/enable-the-docusign-integration-on-your-companys-procore-account).


##  Steps 
Choose from these options to link your DocuSignยฎ account to a Procore project:
  * Link Your DocuSignยฎ Account from My Profile Settings  
OR
  * Link Your DocuSignยฎ Account from a Project Tool


### Link Your DocuSignยฎ Account from My Profile Settings
  * Navigate to the Procore project that you want to link your DocuSignยฎ account to.
  * Click your avatar and choose **My Profile Settings**.   
![My Profile Settings](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7ade357c9099756f12873b36a742f495/e2fe3262eb474759a34ac2ff1617883e/my-profile-settings.png?fm=webp)
  * Scroll to the bottom of the page.
  * Next to the **Link DocuSignยฎ Account** field, click the **Login with DocuSignยฎ** button. If you do not see this button, complete the Prerequisites above.   
![Login With Docusign](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a26d8d94ea34da68f8c0cc9841324cf9/04d0d681978932923198e402cf45540e/login-with-docusign.png?fm=webp)
  * In the DocuSignยฎ 'please log in to your account page:
    * Enter the **Email Address** for your DocuSignยฎ account.
    * Click **Continue**.
    * Enter your DocuSignยฎ account password in the **Password** box.
    * Click **Log In**. 
#####  Note
If you are logging into your DocuSignยฎ account from a new device, DocuSignยฎ will require you to enter a confirmation code. Follow the on-screen steps to complete the process.


After successfully logging into DocuSignยฎ, your account is linked to Procore. The word 'Synced' appears and you will no longer need to enter your DocuSignยฎ login credentials again when accessing your DocuSignยฎ account from the Procore web application.
![Docusign Account Synced](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/424f4cc6ccf63020c7bbcbde707970c2/0fc7ba6e4b6be26b5caddfb9e2788dcb/docusign-account-synced.png?fm=webp)
### Link Your DocuSignยฎ Account from a Project Tool
  * Follow the appropriate steps to create one of the items that support DocuSignยฎ signatures:
    * [Bulk Send Subcontractor Invoices to DocuSignยฎ](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/bulk-send-subcontractor-invoices-to-docusign-with-the-invoicing-tool)
    * [Complete Owner Invoices with DocuSignยฎ](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/complete-owner-invoices-with-docusign)
    * [Complete Subcontractor Invoices with DocuSignยฎ](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/complete-subcontractor-invoices-with-docusign)
    * [Complete a Commitment Contract with DocuSignยฎ](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/complete-a-commitment-contract-with-docusign)
    * [Complete a Commitment Change Order with DocuSignยฎ](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/complete-a-commitment-change-order-cco-with-docusign)
    * [Complete a Prime Contract with DocuSignยฎ](https://support.procore.com/products/online/user-guide/project-level/funding/tutorials/complete-a-funding-with-docusign)
    * [Complete a Potential Change Order for a Prime Contract with DocuSignยฎ](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/complete-a-potential-change-order-for-a-prime-contract-with-docusign)
    * [Sign a Document with DocuSignยฎ](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/documents-project/tutorials/sign-a-document-with-docusign-in-the-project-level-documents-tool)
  * After performing the required data entry on the item, click the **Complete with DocuSignยฎ** button.
  * Log into your DocuSignยฎ account. 
#####  Notes
    * After logging into DocuSignยฎ for the first time, the Procore + DocuSignยฎ integration links your DocuSignยฎ account to the Procore project and your accounts are considered to be 'Synced.'
    * When your accounts are 'Synced', you will NOT need to enter your DocuSignยฎ login credentials again when accessing your DocuSignยฎ account from the Procore web application.


## See Also
  * [When does the 'Signature Required' column in the Change Orders tool display the signer's name?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-when-does-the-signature-required-column-display-in-the-lifecycle-of-a-change-order)
  * [Which Procore project tools support the DocuSignยฎ integration?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-project-tools-support-the-docusign-integration)
  * [Which tools can I extract project data from using the Procore Extracts application?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-tools-can-i-extract-project-data-from-using-the-procore-extracts-application)
title: Link your DocuSignยฎ account to a Procore project
description: How to link your DocuSign account to a Procore project.
